publications

2019

A regime switching model for smart beta investing using hidden Markov models E. Fons. Talk presented at Quant Summit 2019, London, UK. [Slides]
A novel dynamic asset allocation system using Feature Saliency Hidden Markov models for smart beta investing E. Fons, P. Dawson, J. Yau, X. Zeng, J. Keane. [Arxiv]

2015

Improvement of the event selection for W-pairs in the semi-leptonic channel with a boosted hadronic W E. Fons. MSc thesis, Max Planck Institute for Physics, Munich, Germany. [PDF]
Elementary Electromagnetism J. G. Roederer. Undergraduate level textbook written by Juan Roederer. Edited and corrected by J. Aliaga, D. Cartelli, E. Fons, D. Rodrigues, I. Sidelnik and A. Sztrajman.
Group Photo! 1 2

2013

Studies of the MuGirl pattern recognition for the ATLAS upgrade E. Fons, A. Di Mattia, N. Van Eldik, S. Tarem. Talk presented at CERN, Geneva, Switzerland.
